# Plan: Add `ImageTextToTextPipeline` to Transformers.js

## Context

Transformers.js already ships `AutoModelForImageTextToText` (in `src/models.js`) supporting models like Florence-2, LLaVA, PaliGemma, Qwen2-VL, SmolVLM, etc. However, there is no corresponding pipeline in `src/pipelines.js`, so users cannot instantiate these models via the convenient `pipeline()` factory. This plan adds the missing `"image-text-to-text"` pipeline entry, following the exact same patterns as the `ImageToTextPipeline` and `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` reference implementations.

**Only one file needs to be modified:** `src/pipelines.js`

---

## Critical File

- **`src/pipelines.js`** — all changes are confined to this single file.

---

## Step-by-Step Implementation

### Step 1 — Add `AutoModelForImageTextToText` to the import block (lines 15–44)

In the `import { ... } from './models.js'` block, add `AutoModelForImageTextToText,` after `AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction` (keep alphabetical order within the `AutoModel*` group):

```javascript
import {
    AutoModel,
    AutoModelForSequenceClassification,
    AutoModelForAudioClassification,
    AutoModelForTokenClassification,
    AutoModelForQuestionAnswering,
    AutoModelForMaskedLM,
    AutoModelForSeq2SeqLM,
    AutoModelForSpeechSeq2Seq,
    AutoModelForTextToWaveform,
    AutoModelForTextToSpectrogram,
    AutoModelForCTC,
    AutoModelForCausalLM,
    AutoModelForVision2Seq,
    AutoModelForImageClassification,
    AutoModelForImageSegmentation,
    AutoModelForSemanticSegmentation,
    AutoModelForUniversalSegmentation,
    AutoModelForObjectDetection,
    AutoModelForZeroShotObjectDetection,
    AutoModelForDocumentQuestionAnswering,
    AutoModelForImageToImage,
    AutoModelForDepthEstimation,
    AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction,
    AutoModelForImageTextToText,   // <-- ADD THIS LINE
    PreTrainedModel,
} from './models.js';
```

---

### Step 2 — Insert the `ImageTextToTextPipeline` class after `ImageToTextPipeline` (after line 2005)

Insert the following block immediately after the closing `}` of `ImageToTextPipeline` (line 2005), before the `ImageClassificationPipeline` typedefs. It follows the exact same structure as the two reference pipelines.

```javascript
/**
 * @typedef {Object} ImageTextToTextSingle
 * @property {string} generated_text The generated text.
 * @typedef {ImageTextToTextSingle[]} ImageTextToTextOutput
 *
 * @callback ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback Answer questions or generate text based on an image input.
 * @param {ImageInput} image The image to be processed by the pipeline.
 * @param {string} text The text prompt describing what to do with the image (e.g., "Describe this image in detail").
 * @param {Partial<import('./generation/configuration_utils.js').GenerationConfig>} [options] Additional keyword arguments to pass along to the generate method of the model.
 * @returns {Promise<ImageTextToTextOutput>} An array of objects containing the generated text(s).
 *
 * @typedef {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs & ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback & Disposable} ImageTextToTextPipelineType
 */

/**
 * Image-text-to-text pipeline using any `AutoModelForImageTextToText`. This pipeline generates text
 * based on an image and a text prompt describing the task to perform.
 *
 * **Example:** Generate a description for an image w/ `onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft`.
 * ```javascript
 * const pipe = await pipeline('image-text-to-text', 'onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft');
 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/cats.jpg';
 * const output = await pipe(url, 'Describe this image in detail');
 * // [{ generated_text: 'Two cats are lying on a couch...' }]
 * ```
 */
export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageTextToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(image, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // Preprocess image
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(image);
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);

        // Tokenize text prompt
        const { input_ids } = this.tokenizer(text, {
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        });

        // Run model
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            inputs: input_ids,
            pixel_values,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode output
        const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
            skip_special_tokens: true,
        }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));

        return decoded;
    }
}
```

> **Key decisions:**
> - Uses `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs` (has `task`, `model`, `tokenizer`, `processor`) — same as both reference pipelines.
> - `prepareImages` is an existing helper (line 90) that normalises URL/RawImage inputs.
> - `inputs: input_ids` + `pixel_values` is the standard call signature for ImageTextToText models (e.g. Florence-2, LLaVA) — the model's forward pass merges image tokens internally.
> - Returns a flat `ImageTextToTextOutput[]` (not array-of-arrays) since the pipeline signature takes a single image + single prompt (batch size = 1), matching `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline`'s behaviour.

---

### Step 3 — Add entry to `SUPPORTED_TASKS` (after the `"image-to-text"` entry, ~line 3255)

Insert immediately after the closing `},` of the `"image-to-text"` entry, before `"image-classification"`:

```javascript
"image-text-to-text": {
    "tokenizer": AutoTokenizer,
    "pipeline": ImageTextToTextPipeline,
    "model": AutoModelForImageTextToText,
    "processor": AutoProcessor,
    "default": {
        "model": "onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft",
    },
    "type": "multimodal",

## Context

This plan adds the missing `"image-text-to-text"` pipeline entry, following the exact same patterns as the `ImageToTextPipeline` and `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` reference implementations.

**Only one file needs to be modified:** `src/pipelines.js`

---

    AutoModel,
    AutoModelForSequenceClassification,
    AutoModelForAudioClassification,
    AutoModelForTokenClassification,
    AutoModelForQuestionAnswering,
    AutoModelForMaskedLM,
    AutoModelForSeq2SeqLM,
    AutoModelForSpeechSeq2Seq,
    AutoModelForTextToWaveform,
    AutoModelForTextToSpectrogram,
    AutoModelForCTC,
    AutoModelForCausalLM,
    AutoModelForVision2Seq,
    AutoModelForImageClassification,
    AutoModelForImageSegmentation,
    AutoModelForSemanticSegmentation,
    AutoModelForUniversalSegmentation,
    AutoModelForObjectDetection,
    AutoModelForZeroShotObjectDetection,
    AutoModelForDocumentQuestionAnswering,
    AutoModelForImageToImage,
    AutoModelForDepthEstimation,
    AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction,
    AutoModelForImageTextToText,   // <-- ADD THIS LINE
    PreTrainedModel,
} from './models.js';
```

---

### Step 2 — Insert the `ImageTextToTextPipeline` class after `ImageToTextPipeline` (after line 2005)

Insert the following block immediately after the closing `}` of `ImageToTextPipeline` (line 2005), before the `ImageClassificationPipeline` typedefs. It follows the exact same structure as the two reference pipelines.

```javascript
/**
 * @typedef {Object} ImageTextToTextSingle
 * @property {string} generated_text The generated text.
 * @typedef {ImageTextToTextSingle[]} ImageTextToTextOutput
 *
 * @callback ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback Answer questions or generate text based on an image input.
 * @param {ImageInput} image The image to be processed by the pipeline.
 * @param {string} text The text prompt describing what to do with the image (e.g., "Describe this image in detail").
 * @param {Partial<import('./generation/configuration_utils.js').GenerationConfig>} [options] Additional keyword arguments to pass along to the generate method of the model.
 * @returns {Promise<ImageTextToTextOutput>} An array of objects containing the generated text(s).
 *
 * @typedef {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs & ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback & Disposable} ImageTextToTextPipelineType
 */

/**
 * Image-text-to-text pipeline using any `AutoModelForImageTextToText`. This pipeline generates text
 * based on an image and a text prompt describing the task to perform.
 *
 * **Example:** Generate a description for an image w/ `onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft`.
 * ```javascript
 * const pipe = await pipeline('image-text-to-text', 'onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft');
 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/cats.jpg';
 * const output = await pipe(url, 'Describe this image in detail');
 * // [{ generated_text: 'Two cats are lying on a couch...' }]
 * ```
 */
export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageTextToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(image, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // Preprocess image
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(image);
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);

        // Tokenize text prompt
        const { input_ids } = this.tokenizer(text, {
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        });

        // Run model
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            inputs: input_ids,
            pixel_values,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode output
        const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
            skip_special_tokens: true,
        }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));

        return decoded;
    }
}
```

/**
 * Image-text-to-text pipeline using any `AutoModelForImageTextToText`. This pipeline generates text
 * based on an image and a text prompt describing the task to perform.

 * **Example:** Generate a description for an image w/ `onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft`.

 * const output = await pipe(url, 'Describe this image in detail');
 * // [{ generated_text: 'Two cats are lying on a couch...' }]
 * ```

export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageTextToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(image, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // Preprocess image
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(image);
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);

        // Tokenize text prompt
        const { input_ids } = this.tokenizer(text, {
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        });

        // Run model
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            inputs: input_ids,
            pixel_values,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode output
        const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
            skip_special_tokens: true,

        return decoded;
    }
